task_completion.description: Verify the Android Settings app or Quick Settings panel is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the main Android Settings menu or the expanded Quick Settings panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Flight Crew View' app is located in the settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app 'Flight Crew View' is visible in the 'All apps' list, its 'App Info' page is open, or it is selected in the DND settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the specific menu for configuring DND exceptions for Flight Crew View is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the 'Notifications' settings for Flight Crew View, or the 'Apps that can interrupt' menu within the Do Not Disturb settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the Do Not Disturb override is enabled for Flight Crew View.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A toggle such as 'Override Do Not Disturb' or 'Allow notifications' (under DND settings) is switched to the ON position for Flight Crew View, OR the app is listed under allowed apps in the DND settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the system-wide Do Not Disturb mode is currently active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Do Not Disturb icon (usually a circle with a minus sign or a crescent moon) is visible in the top status bar, OR the main Do Not Disturb toggle is shown in the ON position.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Android graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard Android UI elements (Settings app, toggles, lists) rather than a terminal emulator or command-line interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the correct application settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings being modified clearly belong to 'Flight Crew View' and not a generic or differently named application.

integrity.description: Verify the settings were changed via manual GUI navigation.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a logical progression of screens (e.g., Settings -> Apps -> App Info -> Notifications) rather than settings magically changing without intermediate navigation steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target app is 'Flight Crew View' (package: com.robert.fcView). The task requires enabling a Do Not Disturb exception for this specific app. Additionally, the system-wide Do Not Disturb mode must be visually confirmed as active (e.g., DND icon in the status bar or DND toggle ON).
